message:
br-h164o: isolate mcp_manifest_golden sqlite paths via tempfile

ft-h164o: six tests in mcp_manifest_golden.rs passed fixed
/tmp/ft-mcp-manifest-*.sqlite3 paths to capture_manifest(). Under
concurrent agent builds (multiple /tmp/ft-<agent>-target trees running
the same suite in parallel), two processes hitting the same path race
on creation/registration, and any future change that begins opening the
DB during registration turns these into flaky tests.

Introduce isolated_db_path() returning (TempDir, PathBuf) and route all
six call sites through it. tempfile is already a dev-dependency; the
TempDir binding is held for the test's scope so the directory is only
cleaned up after the capture completes. The on-disk behaviour is
unchanged for the current no-op-registration case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
